name: Codec-Gauge: Learning Compression-Friendly Gauges for Transformer KV Caches
summary: arXiv:2607.20538v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Long-context Transformer inference increasingly relies on KV-cache compression or quantization. Prior rotation and transform-coding results suggest...
description: arXiv:2607.20538v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Long-context Transformer inference increasingly relies on KV-cache compression or quantization. Prior rotation and transform-coding results suggest that the channel basis of each key/value vector affects how faithfully a fixed backend preserves model behavior. We introduce Codec-Gauge, a post-training cache-coordinate layer that learns small ort...
author: Yitao Jiang, Yaoqing Yang, Luyang Zhao, Muhao Chen, Devin Balkcom
